title: Otzar Founder Requirements Register
controlling_rule: Nothing is complete until register + implementation + tests + live proof + regression.

live_snapshot.o01_deep: employee 5/0/2 + admin direct prove inventory default MCP advanced

requirements.exact_requirement: Every normal login lands on role-appropriate Home (/app for employees); prior arbitrary route is not restored.

requirements.live_acceptance: Login as employee → /app; returnTo=/users refused

requirements.remaining_gap: Boundary preservation LIVE. Relay messaging product itself is NOT_STARTED (see T-02+).
requirements.live_acceptance: Relay boundary card; CT shell vs Relay roadmap; no merge confusion

final_proof.notes: Comms+admin cards; 5 rules; relay not shipped; no merge confusion; Today is CT Work OS

requirements.acceptance_limitations: Proves CT vs Relay doctrine + UI honesty only; zero Relay chat/call/attachment runtime.

requirements.exact_requirement: Otzar Relay first messaging slice: human sends message; Foundation durable communication event + thread turn; optional Twin participation labeled; Comms can promote to work under gates.
requirements.founder_intent: Relay is required program — first real messaging slice.
requirements.remaining_gap: Not built. EXPERIENCE_GOVERNING_SPEC defines first slice; CT boundary T-01 LIVE.

requirements.exact_requirement: Relay mobile+desktop: chats, calls, voice notes, attachments, phone credential ≠ identity, portable professional identity, org-bound context, AI Teammate, communication→execution, BEAM/Elixir real-time boundary, Foundation authority, multi-org external safety.
requirements.founder_intent: Full Relay product vision.
requirements.remaining_gap: Separate product program not started; prerequisites include Foundation messaging rails.

requirements.exact_requirement: Industry-specific compliance packages: selective regulator disclosure, evidence packages, approvals, redactions, source manifests, correction/supplementation, cross-application evidence.
requirements.founder_intent: Compliance/regulator substrate is core Foundation program.
requirements.remaining_gap: Model documented; substrate primitives (grants/audit/org boundary) exist. No regulator role, package objects, or external access path.

requirements.exact_requirement: Internal compliance package preview: admin defines policy-bound query over curated knowledge; sees exactly what a regulator would see with lineage + simulated access log; zero external access.
requirements.founder_intent: Safe first compliance slice before any external door.
requirements.remaining_gap: Documented as safe first slice; not implemented in CT UI.

requirements.exact_requirement: Mobile and desktop continuity of ambient Otzar presence: same orchestrator across web/desktop/voice; selected-window/safe desktop context; no covert keylogging; future device readiness.
requirements.founder_intent: Ambient multi-surface, not web-only.
requirements.remaining_gap: Web ambient (D-01/D-02/D-04) LIVE; desktop verification docs exist; native mobile shell and full desktop method extraction residual.

requirements.exact_requirement: Communication ingestion at enterprise volume: multi-source, messy concurrency, lineage-preserving ETL, honest missing-provider states — simulated and bounded real.
requirements.founder_intent: Comms ingestion is core Work OS, not optional.
requirements.remaining_gap: K-01/K-03/N paths LIVE at demo scale; full multi-day messy concurrent ingestion sim residual.

register_completeness_audit.note: Audit restored missing Relay/compliance/scale/continuity rows; CT Gate A nearly closed ≠ full Otzar freeze.
